groups.name: Taylor Sheridan TV shows
groups.explanation: Yellowstone, 1883, Tulsa King, and Mayor of Kingstown are all television shows created and/or run by Taylor Sheridan.

groups.name: Netflix shows renewed for Season 2 before Season 1 even premiered
groups.explanation: Emily in Paris, Ratched, The Witcher, and Bridgerton were all renewed by Netflix for a second season before their first season had officially premiered — Netflix ordered the next season based on early internal viewing data.

groups.name: Orphan Black clones played by Tatiana Maslany
groups.explanation: Sarah Manning, Cosima Niehaus, Alison Hendrix, and Helena are all clone characters in Orphan Black, each portrayed by Tatiana Maslany.

groups.name: TV shows cancelled by one network and revived by a different one
groups.explanation: Arrested Development (Fox → Netflix), Brooklyn Nine-Nine (Fox → NBC), Lucifer (Fox → Netflix), and Manifest (NBC → Netflix) were all cancelled by their original networks and subsequently picked up and continued by a different network or streaming service.
